description: Product Description Made from 100% Organic Cotton The Long Towelling Robe Transforming the way you unwind forever, this 100% organic cotton robe is as comforting as it is practical. Carefully crafted from the highest quality, hand-picked organic cotton with an extra-luxurious weight for durability and exceptional absorbency, finished with a removable belt. Perfect for slipping on straight from the shower or cocooning yourself on the sofa for a cosy night in. Best Bits Deep Pockets Generously sized to fill with plenty of snacks Extra-Luxurious Weight Crafted with a luxurious 550gsm weave to envelop you in a soft, warming hug. Absorbent Perfect for slipping on straight from the shower, our special tumbling process and low-twist technique ensures superior absorbency Woven Loop Easy to hang anywhere with its handy, reinforced inner loop. What is the sizing?
